subtitle: Match the right AI Card to a real TNM Malawi pain point
audience: TNM Malawi executives, managers and specialists participating in the UCT GSB AI Leadership in Action programme
game_objective: Diagnose the root cause, compare four AI solution cards, select the best first intervention, and defend the required data, governance and success measures.
important_note: The challenges are grounded in public TNM, regulatory or Malawi-sector evidence. Names, exact incidents, sample outputs and internal workflows are fictionalised for training. This file does not claim access to confidential TNM information.

S1.title: TNM summarised audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2025
S1.basis: Documents network investment, mobile-money and data growth, and pressure from foreign-currency scarcity, fuel prices and inflation.

S2.title: Revenue Assurance Analyst and Business Intelligence Specialist vacancy announcement
S2.basis: Documents revenue leakage, GSM and Mobile Money fraud, reconciliations, rate assurance and BI requirements.

S3.title: Q1 2025 TNM and Airtel Quality of Service Report
S3.basis: Confirms that mobile-network quality is formally measured and regulated in Malawi.

S4.title: TNM vacancies page
S4.basis: Shows continuing recruitment across customer experience, billing, mobile money, network, finance, risk, compliance and legal roles.

S5.title: Communications rules and regulations
S5.basis: Documents quality-of-service, consumer-protection, licensing and telecommunications obligations.

S6.title: TNM Plc annual-report and public-company filings page
S6.basis: Provides TNM annual reports, public-company reporting context and governance disclosures.

S7.title: TNM introduces SIM-swap security feature on Mpamba
S7.basis: Reports TNM action to curb mobile-money fraud and SIM-swap abuse.

S8.title: Social cash transfers spur financial inclusion
S8.basis: Documents mobile-money agent liquidity challenges in hard-to-reach parts of Malawi.

S9.title: TNM customer-support contacts
S9.basis: Confirms TNM call-centre and WhatsApp customer-support channels.

S10.title: Competition-law process involving TNM Mpamba agent arrangements
S10.publisher: Competition and Fair Trading Commission of Malawi
S10.basis: Demonstrates the competition and agent-network compliance environment around Mpamba.

scenarios.title: Keep the Northern Region Connected
scenarios.tnm_role: Tadala Nyirenda, Regional Network Operations Manager
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Unplanned site outages and costly emergency maintenance

grounding.note: Publicly grounded; names and operational details are fictionalised.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: Several TNM sites serving communities between Mzimba and Rumphi experience intermittent disruptions. Engineers receive many battery, generator and cooling alarms but often act after equipment fails. Emergency visits consume fuel, replacement parts may require foreign currency, and customers experience slow data or loss of service.
scenarios.player_task: Choose the AI Card TNM should implement first to address the root cause.

solution_cards.name: Predictive Site-Maintenance AI
what_it_can_do: Analyse battery voltage and charging patterns
Detect abnormal generator and cooling behaviour
solution_cards.sample_output: Site MZ-042 has an 82% likelihood of battery failure within 48 hours.

solution_cards.name: Network-Traffic Forecasting AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Traffic near Mzuzu Stadium may rise by 38% on Saturday.

solution_cards.name: Customer-Churn Prediction AI
what_it_can_do: Identify customers likely to become inactive
solution_cards.sample_output: Customers affected by repeated outages have elevated churn risk.

solution_cards.name: Generative Incident Copilot
solution_cards.sample_output: Three sites experienced power-related interruptions between 14:00 and 16:30.

scenarios.why_best: The root problem is late detection of equipment deterioration. Card A helps prevent the outage.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.B: Best for congestion, not equipment failure.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: The best AI solution addresses the root operational cause, not merely its consequences.
scenarios.bonus_question: Would Card A remain best if the site equipment were healthy but overloaded every evening?

scenarios.title: The Kamuzu Stadium Data Surge
scenarios.tnm_role: Chifundo Mbewe, Radio Network Planning Specialist

grounding.note: Grounded in network-quality priorities; the match-day incident is fictionalised.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: During a major match at Kamuzu Stadium, supporters upload videos, use WhatsApp and make mobile-money payments at the same time. Nearby cells perform normally on ordinary days but become congested before kick-off, at half-time and after the final whistle.
scenarios.player_task: Select the AI Card most likely to anticipate and manage the congestion.

solution_cards.name: Event-Aware Traffic Forecasting AI
what_it_can_do: Learn traffic by cell and time
Combine event and historical network data
solution_cards.sample_output: Cells BT-118 and BT-121 may exceed safe capacity between 14:40 and 15:20.

solution_cards.name: Predictive Site-Maintenance AI
solution_cards.sample_output: The cooling fan at site BT-118 may fail next week.

solution_cards.name: Marketing Content Generator
solution_cards.sample_output: Enjoy every goal with TNM data bundles.

solution_cards.name: Monthly QoS Dashboard
what_it_can_do: Display historical speed and outage KPIs
solution_cards.sample_output: Average Blantyre speed declined during the reporting month.

scenarios.why_best: The problem is a predictable, location-specific demand spike. Card A allows action before service deteriorates.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.B: Equipment failure is not the problem.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Could increase traffic without solving congestion.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.D: Reports the problem after the event.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: AI planning works best when it predicts demand at the right place and time.
scenarios.bonus_question: What non-AI actions should TNM combine with the forecast?

scenarios.title: The Mpamba SIM-Swap Warning
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Mobile-money fraud and suspicious SIM-swap behaviour

grounding.note: Directly grounded in Mpamba fraud controls; transaction details are fictionalised.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: A customer SIM is swapped in Lilongwe. Within 20 minutes, the device, location and transaction pattern change. Several transfers are attempted to new recipients, but each remains below the existing fixed threshold.
scenarios.player_task: Choose the best first-line AI decision-support card.

solution_cards.name: Behavioural Fraud and Anomaly AI
solution_cards.type_of_ai: Anomaly detection, graph analytics and risk scoring
what_it_can_do: Compare behaviour with the normal pattern
Detect unusual device and recipient sequences
solution_cards.sample_output: High risk: recent SIM swap, new device, five new recipients and transaction velocity nine times above normal.

solution_cards.name: Customer Churn AI
solution_cards.sample_output: This customer may reduce Mpamba use next month.

solution_cards.name: Fraud-Awareness Content Writer
solution_cards.sample_output: Never disclose your Mpamba PIN.

solution_cards.name: Fixed High-Value Rule
what_it_can_do: Block transactions above a set amount
solution_cards.sample_output: Decline transfers above the configured limit.

scenarios.why_best: The fraud signal is a linked behavioural sequence, not one large transaction.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Education cannot identify the current attack.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.D: A single threshold is easy to evade and creates false positives.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: The aim is early, fair risk detection—not automatic punishment.
scenarios.bonus_question: Which cases may be safe for automatic verification, and which require an investigator?

scenarios.title: No Cash at the Lakeshore Agent
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Agent liquidity shortages and failed cash-outs

grounding.note: Grounded in Malawi agent-liquidity challenges and Mpamba growth; the named agent is fictional.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: At month-end, an Mpamba agent near Monkey Bay runs out of cash by midday. Customers receiving salaries or remittances cannot cash out. Other agents hold excess cash, but emergency rebalancing is slow and expensive.
scenarios.player_task: Pick the AI Card that best prevents liquidity shortages.

solution_cards.name: Agent Liquidity Forecasting AI
what_it_can_do: Account for pay cycles and market days
solution_cards.sample_output: Agent MG-031 may face a MWK 4.2 million cash shortfall by 13:00 tomorrow.

solution_cards.name: Fraud Anomaly AI
solution_cards.sample_output: This wallet pattern is unusual.

solution_cards.name: Agent Support Chatbot
solution_cards.sample_output: Here are the steps for requesting a float adjustment.

solution_cards.name: Kiosk Branding Vision AI
solution_cards.sample_output: The Mpamba sign is partially obscured.

scenarios.why_best: The root problem is a predictable mismatch between local demand and available liquidity.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.B: Protects funds but does not solve liquidity mismatch.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Reacts after the shortage is known.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.D: Branding is unrelated to cash availability.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: Optimisation should improve inclusion, not only urban profitability.
scenarios.bonus_question: How should rural-access and social-value goals alter the optimisation objective?

scenarios.title: The Blantyre Contact-Centre Queue
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Long handling times and inconsistent responses

grounding.note: Grounded in TNM support channels and customer-experience roles; queue details are fictionalised.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: Agents receive questions about bundles, Mpamba reversals, outages, SIM registration and balances. They search several systems, copy information manually and sometimes classify escalation cases incorrectly.
scenarios.player_task: Choose the AI Card that improves service while preserving human accountability.

solution_cards.name: Multilingual Customer-Service Copilot
solution_cards.sample_output: Likely issue: failed bundle activation. Escalate to Billing if the approved recovery step fails.

solution_cards.name: Autonomous Complaint Closer
what_it_can_do: Close complaints after sending a response
solution_cards.sample_output: Complaint closed because a reply was sent.

solution_cards.name: Marketing Recommendation AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Offer Mxit 2000.

solution_cards.name: Call-Volume Dashboard
what_it_can_do: Display calls by hour and reason
solution_cards.sample_output: The centre received 2,400 calls yesterday.

scenarios.why_best: The challenge combines language, retrieval, consistency, classification and escalation.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.B: A response does not prove resolution.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Selling does not solve the complaint.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.D: Helps managers but not the agent handling the case.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: A fast wrong answer is still poor customer service.
scenarios.bonus_question: Which complaint types should never be handled end-to-end without a person?

scenarios.title: The Missing Kwacha Across GSM and Mpamba
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Revenue leakage, reconciliation differences and incorrect rating

grounding.note: Directly grounded in TNM revenue-assurance responsibilities; amounts are fictional.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: Small differences appear between usage records, bundle charging, Mpamba payments, promotions, partner settlements and the general ledger. Each difference is below the current threshold, but together they may represent a meaningful loss.
scenarios.player_task: Select the AI Card that best detects leakage while preserving financial controls.

solution_cards.name: Intelligent Revenue-Reconciliation AI
solution_cards.type_of_ai: Anomaly detection, entity matching and root-cause clustering
what_it_can_do: Match records across GSM, Mpamba and billing
solution_cards.sample_output: Promotion code MX-47 shows 1,842 mismatches with estimated exposure of MWK 18.6 million.

solution_cards.name: Generative Board-Speech Writer
solution_cards.sample_output: Revenue performance remained resilient.

solution_cards.name: Customer Sentiment AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Sentiment is negative about bundle depletion.

solution_cards.name: Automatic Journal-Entry Agent
solution_cards.sample_output: Journal entry posted to remove the difference.

scenarios.why_best: It addresses matching, anomaly detection and root-cause investigation without bypassing controls.
scenarios.facilitator_debrief: AI accelerates detection; accountable people approve financial action.
scenarios.bonus_question: What evidence should be required before an anomaly becomes confirmed leakage?

scenarios.title: Finding and Growing Scarce Skills
scenarios.tnm_role: Madalitso Jere, Human Resources Business Partner
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Specialist recruitment, internal skills visibility and succession planning

grounding.note: A reasonable inference from continuing specialist recruitment; not a claim that TNM has publicly declared a skills crisis.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: TNM recruits specialist roles while some employees may already have relevant certifications or transferable experience that is not visible in the HR system. Managers repeatedly nominate the same people for opportunities, and training is not always linked to future roles.
scenarios.player_task: Choose the AI Card that improves workforce planning without making unreviewable employment decisions.

solution_cards.name: Skills Intelligence and Internal-Mobility AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Three employees match at least 75% of the Network Surveillance role; the main gaps are Python and advanced radio analytics.

solution_cards.name: Automatic Hiring and Rejection AI
what_it_can_do: Reject candidates using an undisclosed score
solution_cards.sample_output: Candidate rejected. Explanation unavailable.

solution_cards.name: Payroll Forecasting AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Overtime may rise next quarter.

solution_cards.name: Employee Newsletter Generator
solution_cards.sample_output: Welcome to this month’s TNM people update.

scenarios.why_best: The root problem is weak visibility of skills and development pathways.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Does not identify talent or skills.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: AI should reveal overlooked talent, not become a hidden gatekeeper.
scenarios.bonus_question: Which employee data should be excluded even if it might improve prediction?

scenarios.title: The Regulatory Obligation Maze
scenarios.tnm_role: Tamanda Mwale, Legal and Regulatory Affairs Manager
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Tracking obligations across licences, QoS, consumer protection, Mpamba and contracts

grounding.note: Grounded in TNM regulation, legal/compliance roles and a documented Mpamba competition-law matter.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: Legal teams monitor licence conditions, QoS duties, consumer-protection rules, contract renewals, Mpamba obligations and competition-law restrictions. Updates arrive in different documents and business units own different actions.
scenarios.player_task: Select the AI Card that helps legal staff find and track obligations without replacing legal judgement.

solution_cards.name: Regulatory and Contract Intelligence AI
solution_cards.type_of_ai: Document AI, retrieval and obligation extraction
what_it_can_do: Compare rules with policies and contracts
solution_cards.sample_output: Clause 8 requires quarterly reporting. Proposed owner: Regulatory Affairs. Source: page 14, paragraph 3.

solution_cards.name: Autonomous Legal Decision Agent
what_it_can_do: Approve contracts and submit responses without review
solution_cards.sample_output: Contract approved and regulator response submitted.

solution_cards.name: Customer Churn AI
solution_cards.sample_output: This customer may stop purchasing bundles.

solution_cards.name: Network Anomaly AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Cell utilisation is above normal.

scenarios.why_best: The problem is finding, comparing and tracking obligations across authoritative documents.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.B: Legal approvals require accountable professional judgement.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.D: Network monitoring cannot interpret law or contracts.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: Legal AI should make evidence easier to find, not pretend to be the accountable lawyer.
scenarios.bonus_question: How should the system respond when two legal documents appear to conflict?

scenarios.title: The Risk Committee's Early-Warning System
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Fragmented risk signals and delayed escalation

grounding.note: Directly grounded in TNM macroeconomic risk and governance disclosures; meeting details are fictional.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: Risk indicators are spread across finance, network operations, procurement, Mpamba, customer service, legal and cybersecurity. Reports arrive at different times, so a growing risk may only become visible after impact has increased.
scenarios.player_task: Choose the AI Card that strengthens risk sensing while keeping risk ownership with management and the Board.

solution_cards.name: Enterprise Risk-Sensing AI
solution_cards.type_of_ai: Anomaly detection, forecasting and knowledge graph
what_it_can_do: Map risks to owners and controls
solution_cards.sample_output: Foreign-currency lead times, fuel costs and delayed equipment orders jointly indicate rising network-continuity risk.

solution_cards.name: Board-Minutes Generator
solution_cards.sample_output: The Committee noted the increase in operational risk.

solution_cards.name: Automatic Risk Acceptance Agent
what_it_can_do: Accept or close risks without approval
solution_cards.sample_output: Risk accepted because expected loss is below the model threshold.

solution_cards.name: Poster Generator
solution_cards.sample_output: A visual illustrating resilience.

scenarios.why_best: The need is earlier detection of connected risk signals and clearer ownership.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.B: Minutes document discussion after the fact.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Risk acceptance is a governance decision.
why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.D: Communications content does not manage risk.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: AI can connect signals; governance determines who decides and remains accountable.
scenarios.bonus_question: When should an AI risk alert go directly to the Board?

scenarios.title: The Board Pack That Arrives Too Late
scenarios.tnm_role: Yamikani Phiri, Company Secretariat and Strategy Reporting Lead
scenarios.pain_point_theme: Slow preparation, inconsistent narratives and weak evidence traceability

grounding.note: Grounded in TNM public-company reporting, BI needs and board oversight; workflow details are fictional.

scenarios.pain_point_scenario: The Board pack combines finance, Mpamba, network quality, customer operations, legal, people and enterprise risk. Teams use different definitions and submit late changes. Directors need concise explanations, but every claim must be traceable to approved evidence.
scenarios.player_task: Choose the AI Card that improves the pack without allowing AI to invent or approve Board information.

solution_cards.name: Evidence-Grounded Board Reporting Copilot
solution_cards.sample_output: Data revenue increased against plan. Evidence: Finance Table 4 and Network KPI Report 7.

solution_cards.name: Unrestricted Board Narrative Generator
solution_cards.sample_output: TNM achieved record satisfaction across all regions.

solution_cards.name: Customer Recommendation Engine
solution_cards.sample_output: Offer Mxit 5000.

solution_cards.name: Predictive Maintenance AI
solution_cards.sample_output: Site BT-022 needs battery inspection.

scenarios.why_best: Board reporting requires synthesis, consistency and traceability across approved information.

why_other_cards_are_less_suitable.C: Customer recommendations do not solve reporting.

scenarios.facilitator_debrief: A Board copilot should improve the quality of evidence, not manufacture confidence.
scenarios.bonus_question: Which parts of a Board pack should remain fully human-authored?
